Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You toss the spinach dip as far over the ocean as you can.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你把菠菜沾醬盡全力扔向大海。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (Which is not really that far.)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （其實也扔不了多遠。）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: It's getting smaller!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 越變越小了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: This is not what you were expecting from a deluxe cruise!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這可不是你對一趟豪華郵輪之旅的期待！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The lifeboat drill has brought the ship to a standstill. What have you done, Larry?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 救生艇演習讓整艘船停了下來。賴瑞，你到底幹了什麼好事？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: A siren wails a warning cry, and the lifeboat begins to shake. You made it to the lifeboat in the nick of time!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 警報器發出淒厲的鳴叫，救生艇開始搖晃。你千鈞一髮之際趕上了救生艇！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Slowly, you drift away from the cruise ship. You wonder what you forgot to pack.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你緩緩漂離郵輪，心裡納悶自己到底忘了帶什麼。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Exactly how long do you think you can hold your breath?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你覺得自己到底能憋氣多久？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You feel your lungs explode as you think to yourself, "Gee, I wish I could hold my breath longer, or I owned a faster computer!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你感覺肺快炸開了，心想：「唉，真希望我能憋氣久一點，或是有台快一點的電腦！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: There is a bikini top caught in the pool's drain!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 泳池的排水孔卡了一件比基尼上衣！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You can remember when there was a bikini top caught in that drain!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你還記得那個排水孔曾經卡過一件比基尼上衣！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The water is clear enough to see too much of that guy in the inner tube!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 水清澈到能把那個泡在游泳圈裡的傢伙看得一清二楚，清楚過頭了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: No way!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 不會吧！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Why do you have such a fascination with plumbing?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你怎麼會對水管這麼著迷？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Just move wherever you want to go.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 想去哪就直接走過去吧。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Oops.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 哎呀。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: And as the good ship U.S.S. Love Tub slowly sinks behind the horizon, we rejoin our noble hero in his latest predicament.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 當愛之浴缸號緩緩沉入海平線之際，讓我們把鏡頭轉回這位偉大英雄的最新窘境。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Isn't it funny how time flies when you're having fun!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 玩得開心時，時間總是過得特別快，真有意思！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: During a particularly rough storm, late in your tenth night at sea, your lifeboat crashes on a coral reef and shatters to bits. You grab the largest piece of wood you can, hold on tight and survive the storm. The dawn finds you crashing through an offshore reef, tumbling through the surf to a gorgeous beach.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 在你出海第十晚，一場異常猛烈的暴風雨中，你的救生艇撞上珊瑚礁，摔得粉碎。你抓住能找到最大的一塊木板，死命抓緊撐過風暴。天亮時，你正撞過近岸的礁石，在浪花中翻滾著衝上一片美麗的海灘。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Boy, is that sun hot!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 哇，這太陽也太毒辣了吧！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: It's a good thing you used that sunscreen to block those ultraviolets! The sun out here is hot enough to fry an egg.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 幸好你擦了防曬乳擋掉紫外線！這裡的太陽熱到能把蛋煎熟。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You think the sun must be even hotter today!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你覺得今天的太陽一定更毒了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: It's a good thing you wore that silly wig. The sun out here is hot enough to fry your brains.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 幸好你戴了那頂蠢假髮。這裡的太陽熱到能把你的腦子給煎熟。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Your thirst becomes more and more intense with every passing day. Visions of pre-Classic Coke float before your eyes!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 隨著日子一天天過去，你的口渴感越來越強烈。眼前不斷浮現古早配方可樂的畫面！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You extract the Grotesque Gulp from your inside coat pocket and are surprised to discover it has retained its entire 32-gallon capacity. You now have enough fluid to last you for weeks; but you are worried about your blood sugar level!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你從西裝內袋掏出那杯「怪物暢飲杯」，驚訝地發現它竟然還裝滿整整32加侖的容量。你現在有足夠的飲料撐上好幾週；不過你有點擔心自己的血糖了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Your hunger grows intense with the passing of the days. Visions of Danny's Pizza float before your eyes!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 隨著日子一天天過去，你的飢餓感越來越強烈。眼前不斷浮現丹尼披薩的畫面！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: It's a good thing you brought that spinach dip along.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 幸好你帶了那罐菠菜沾醬。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You cleverly open the sewing kit you stole from that Mother's nightstand, extract a safety pin and thread. You patiently fish for hours, but eventually catch your limit.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你機靈地打開從那位「大媽」床頭櫃偷來的針線包，抽出一根安全別針和一段細線。你耐心地釣了好幾個小時，終於釣到了你的極限。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (Your limit for raw fish is quite low!)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （你能生吃的魚，其實沒幾條啊！）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You were so clever to grab that basket of fruit from the nightstand.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你真聰明，順手從床頭櫃抓走了那籃水果。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Second-degree burns from the sun are no "Laff-ing" matter, Larry!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 被太陽曬成二度灼傷，賴瑞，這下連姓「拉夫」的你也笑（Laff）不出來了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (Looks like that sunscreen is not waterproof!)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （看來那瓶防曬乳不防水啊！）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The tropical sun has turned your balded brain into an omelette cooked until Sunnyside Soft, Larry!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 熱帶的豔陽把你光禿禿的腦袋煎成了一顆半熟太陽蛋，賴瑞！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Unfortunately for you, the mayonnaise has spoiled in the hot, tropical sun!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 很不幸，美乃滋在炎熱的熱帶豔陽下壞掉了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Perhaps next time you'll pack a little something to drink before beginning your trans-oceanic voyage!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 也許下次跨海遠航前，你該記得帶點東西喝！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You've thought of all your needs, except food. Come on, you can find something to eat somewhere, can't you?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你把什麼都準備齊全了，就是忘了食物。拜託，你總能在哪裡找到點東西吃吧？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Better luck next cruise, Larry!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 賴瑞，祝你下次郵輪之旅好運一點！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: I'm sorry, sir, says the barber sweetly, "I have no more appointments left today!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「不好意思，先生，」理髮師甜甜地說道，「我今天已經沒有空檔了！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You look much better to me, sir!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「先生，我覺得您現在看起來好多了！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Just have a seat in the chair there, responds the barber.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「請坐到那張椅子上吧，」理髮師回答道。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Good day, sir, says the female barber with the long, beautiful, blond hair. "May I help you in your quest?"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「日安，先生，」擁有一頭美麗金色長髮的女理髮師說道，「我能幫上您的冒險嗎？」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Could I just get a slight trim? you ask. "My hair is ridiculously long!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「能不能幫我稍微修剪一下？」你問道，「我的頭髮長得誇張！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Oh, oh! she replies, "I'll be happy to. Just plop it in my chair there, Goldilocks, I'll take care of those curly locks for you!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「哦，哦！」她回答道，「我很樂意。到我這張椅子上坐吧，金髮姑娘，我會好好幫你打理這頭捲髮的！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Gosh, please be careful, you tell her, "I'd hate to lose my full head of hair. Just take a little off the back!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「天啊，請小心一點，」你告訴她，「我可不想失去我這頭濃密的頭髮。後面稍微修一點就好！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: All done, says the barber. "What do you think?"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「好了，」理髮師說道，「您覺得怎麼樣？」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: MY HAIR! you cry. "IT'S GONE!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「我的頭髮！」你大叫，「沒了！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: She replies, "It serves you right; you should never trust a barber with longer, prettier, blonder hair than yours!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 她回答：「這是你活該；你根本不該相信一個頭髮比你更長、更漂亮、更金黃的理髮師！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Well, at least I look like my passport picture now, you sigh, "although that seems small consolation."
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「唉，至少我現在看起來跟護照相片一樣了，」你嘆了口氣，「雖然這安慰不了我多少。」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: I'm sorry you're not satisfied, says the barber. "Here. Take a bottle of this month's special. When you have time, rub a teaspoon on your hair every day for a month. Soon your hair will be full and rich."
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「很抱歉您不滿意，」理髮師說道，「來，拿一瓶這個月的特別產品。有空的話，每天在頭髮上抹一茶匙，持續一個月。很快您的頭髮就會變得濃密豐盈。」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: But be careful, she concludes, "it's highly inflammatory. %s"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「不過要小心，」她最後說道，「這東西非常易燃。%s」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You find Daventry women sexy.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你覺得達文翠（Daventry）的女人很性感。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: By the way, have you played 'King's Quest IV' yet? asks the barber.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「對了，你玩過『國王密使 IV』了嗎？」理髮師問道。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Why, no, I haven't, you reply. "Is it good?"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「呃，還沒耶，」你回答，「好玩嗎？」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Well, I certainly think so, she concludes, "maybe it's just me!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「我個人是覺得很好玩啦，」她總結道，「也許只是我自己這麼覺得而已！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The next time you make a Molotov cocktail, why not try using a wick?!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 下次做汽油彈的時候，何不試試用根引信呢？！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (No one has ever accused you of having a long fuse, Larry!)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （從沒人說過你賴瑞是個慢性子——看來你的引信也一樣短！）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The volcano eruption has interrupted your wedding plans in a most insistent manner! Perhaps this is one time you'll require outside assistance?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 火山爆發用最強硬的方式打斷了你的婚禮計畫！這一次，也許你真的需要外援了？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Next time, you'd better read the label on that bottle of hair rejuvenator!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 下次，你最好先看清楚那瓶生髮水的標籤！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Oops. You're dead.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 哎呀，你死了。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (Don't all witch doctor huts look alike?)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （巫醫的小屋看起來不都長一個樣嗎？）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Just a moment, Larry, while I ready this special preparation!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「稍等一下，賴瑞，我先準備好這帖特製藥方！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: All right, son; come on over here.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「好了，孩子，過來這邊吧。」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Geez, you exclaim, "that's some powerful stuff!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「天啊，」你驚呼，「這玩意兒也太猛了吧！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Here, says the witch doctor, "take a look in this mirror and tell me what you think."
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「來，」巫醫說道，「照照這面鏡子，告訴我你覺得怎麼樣。」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: YOU DID IT! YOU REALLY DID IT!!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「你成功了！你真的成功了！！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: This is great! I look like a young man again; I'm stranded in paradise, broke but happy; and the most beautiful woman I've ever seen is madly in love with me!!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「太棒了！我看起來又年輕了；我雖然身無分文卻困在天堂島上，快樂得很；還有一位我這輩子見過最美的女人，正瘋狂地愛著我！！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: My dreams have all come true!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 「我所有的夢想都成真了！」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You have no need to return that way. Your quest lies before you. Hurry, Larry!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你不需要走回頭路。你的冒險就在前方。快點，賴瑞！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You look through the hole in the rock and see just a cloud.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你透過岩石上的洞望去，只看見一片雲。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (Why? Did you think you see something?)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （怎麼？你以為會看到什麼特別的嗎？）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Sheer cliffs drop off on both sides. For a moment you consider walking very near the edge, just to see if you can fall off. Perhaps you won't. Perhaps you can fly! Perhaps the love of the beautiful Kalalau has given you amazing, magical powers that are only activated here on this enchanted island.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 兩側都是陡峭的懸崖。你一時興起，想走到邊緣看看自己會不會摔下去。也許不會摔。也許你能飛起來！也許美麗的卡拉勞的愛，賦予了你驚人的魔力，而這股魔力只有在這座被施了魔法的島上才會被喚醒。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Perhaps Kalalau's love only SEEMED to give you wings!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 也許卡拉勞的愛，只是「看起來」讓你長出了翅膀而已！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You have fooled around too long! In the distance you hear a foghorn announcing the departure of your cruise ship.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你鬼混得太久了！遠方傳來霧笛聲，宣告你的郵輪已經出發。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: This is the story of your life. Once again, Larry, you have "missed the boat!"
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這就是你人生的寫照。賴瑞，你又一次「錯過了船」！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You're getting off to a slow start, Larry. Perhaps you should dig out the documentation that came with this game and read through the Walk-Thru that begins on page 12.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 賴瑞，你這開頭也太慢了吧。也許你該把遊戲附的說明書挖出來，翻到第12頁開始的攻略指南看看。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: (This is merely a friendly suggestion from your designer and programmer, Al Lowe.)
好主意！現在正是時候！: （這只是你的設計師兼程式設計師艾爾·洛威（Al Lowe）給你的一句友善建議。）

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: No one here is interested in talking to you.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這裡沒人想跟你說話。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You scratch it until you remove the numbers and invalidate it. Since it's no good now, you toss it away!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你把上面的數字刮掉，讓它失效。既然已經沒用了，你就把它扔了！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: There's no need. No sun can pierce that smoggy sky.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 沒這個必要。這片霧霾瀰漫的天空，陽光根本穿不透。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: There are no taxis in this "Leisure Suit Larry."
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這款《休閒西裝賴瑞》裡沒有計程車。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: During a Stage III smog alert, breathing is optional (although still permitted).
好主意！現在正是時候！: 在第三級霧霾警報期間，呼吸是「非必要」的（不過還是被允許的）。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Formerly, you thought LA was filled with cars.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你以前一直以為洛杉磯滿街都是車子。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: It just lies there under your feet.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 它就靜靜躺在你腳下。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Is this whole city paved?
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這整座城市都是柏油路嗎？

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: All the plants here are made of poly-vinyl chloride or another monoxide-breathing substance.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 這裡的植物全都是聚氯乙烯或其他會「呼吸」一氧化碳的物質做成的。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The ship's PA system crackles to life, "We are sorry, ladies and gentlemen, but due to unknown reasons our lifeboats have inadvertently been lowered into the water. We regret this inconvenience."
好主意！現在正是時候！: 船上的廣播系統劈啪作響，傳來廣播：「各位女士先生，很抱歉，由於不明原因，我們的救生艇已不慎被放入水中。造成不便，敬請見諒。」

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You just missed your last chance at escape!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你剛剛錯過了最後的逃生機會！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: The next time you start something, you'd better be prepared to finish it!
好主意！現在正是時候！: 下次開始做什麼事之前，你最好先做好把它做完的準備！

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Ok. You feel refreshed, but fruitless.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 好的。你感覺神清氣爽，但一無所獲。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: Ok. You rapidly glom down a quart of spinach dip and a whole loaf of sourdough bread.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 好的。你迅速地把一夸脫的菠菜沾醬和一整條酸麵包給嗑光了。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You have nothing which needs mending.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你沒有任何東西需要縫補。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You apply the sunscreen to your neck and hands.
好主意！現在正是時候！: 你把防曬乳擦在脖子和雙手上。

Good idea. This would be a perfect time!: You are clever to reapply the sunscreen after your swim washed it off!
